BountyPlatformCore: function createTask(string calldata _title, string calldata _description, uint8 _taskType, uint256 _bountyPerUser, uint256 _maxParticipants, uint256 _startTime, uint256 _endTime, string calldata _requirements, address _tokenAddress, uint256 _categoryId) external returns (uint256)
function submitTask(uint256 _taskId, string calldata _proofHash, string calldata _metadata) external
function rejectSubmission(uint256 _taskId, address _participant, string calldata _reason) external
function rejectSubmissionWithSlash(uint256 _taskId, address _participant, string calldata _reason, bool _slash) external
function createDispute(uint256 _taskId, string calldata _reason, string calldata _evidenceHash) external

function getTaskInfo(uint256 _taskId) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused))
BountyPlatformBidding: function submitBid(uint256 _taskId, uint256 _bidAmount, string calldata _proposal, string calldata _contactInfo) external
function getAllBids(uint256 _taskId) view returns (tuple(uint256 taskId, address bidder, uint256 bidAmount, string proposal, string contactInfo, uint256 bidTime, bool isSelected, bool isLost)[])
function bidDeposits(uint256 taskId, address bidder) view returns (uint256)
function bids(uint256 _taskId, address _bidder) view returns (uint256 taskId, address bidder, uint256 bidAmount, string proposal, string contactInfo, uint256 bidTime, bool isSelected, bool isLost)
BountyQueryHelper: function getTasksPaginated(uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused)[])
function getTaskIdsByStatusPaginated(uint8 _status, uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (uint256[])

function getTasksByCategoryPaginated(uint256 _categoryId, uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused)[])

function getTaskBasicsByIds(uint256[] _taskIds) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused)[])

function getActiveTasks(uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused)[])

function getPendingReviewTasks(uint256 _offset, uint256 _limit) view returns (tuple(uint256 id, address creator, address hunter, string title, string description, uint256 bountyPerUser, uint256 totalBounty, uint256 maxParticipants, uint256 currentParticipants, uint256 startTime, uint256 endTime, uint8 taskType, uint8 status, uint8 disputeStatus, string requirements, uint256 createdAt, uint256 completedAt, bool isRefunded, address tokenAddress, uint256 categoryId, bool isPaused)[])
ERC20: function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) external returns (bool)
function allowance(address owner, address spender) view returns (uint256)
